message:
feat(pages): Add redaction engine for anonymizing sensitive data

Implements a configurable redaction system for anonymizing paths,
usernames, and other sensitive data in exported session content:

Features:
- Home path redaction: /Users/alice -> ~
- Username redaction in path contexts with customizable mappings
- Path prefix replacements for project/organization paths
- Custom regex patterns with named replacements
- Project name anonymization (project-alpha -> project-1)

Architecture:
- RedactionConfig: Declarative configuration for all redaction rules
- RedactionEngine: Stateful engine with memoized project mappings
- RedactedString: Output with change tracking for audit/preview
- RedactionReport: Aggregated statistics with sample captures

The engine supports both text redaction (general content) and
path-specific redaction, with workspace anonymization for
hiding project directory names while preserving structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
